CONTACT.WHATSAPP_MESSAGE: Hi Sabrina! I loved your portfolio!

ABOUT.TITLE: Hi, I'm Sabrina.
ABOUT.INTRO: My name is Sabrina Cardoso, I'm 25 years old and I'm a Product Designer.
ABOUT.EDUCATION: I graduated in Graphic Design from UNIP and have a postgraduate degree in User Experience from Belas Artes de São Paulo. My career started in visual communication and, over time, became increasingly focused on product, UX/UI and creating digital experiences.
ABOUT.CURRENT_ROLE: Currently, I work for BRQ Digital Solutions on projects for Itaú, focusing on financial products, internal systems, customer service and operational tools. On a daily basis, I work with discovery, journey mapping, prototyping, usability testing, documentation and flow improvement with Product, Technology and Business teams.
ABOUT.INTERESTS: I have a special interest in projects involving complex systems, process improvement and experiences that need to be simple for users. I believe design plays an important role in translating needs, organizing information and transforming problems into clearer, more useful and intuitive solutions.
ABOUT.APPROACH: I seek to create experiences that connect people, business goals and usability best practices, always with attention to consistency, accessibility and real impact on the user's journey.
ABOUT.CTA: Want to know more about my journey? Take a look at my resume :)
